10956,1765297169139,1772988620005,5006212406344,50092079953154997,5015806700019318,503881540379,5048725561480001270,505007878760001515,5053510200019352,507089800160,50757123719421,5076480415502114006,50768174490167699,507846166510,5094128200015536,509831025837711,510215470780001123,5107054700000149516,512483633,51264910828425,512801430018385,512853846035319,5131270018821,5151017661195586,5151118148000161086,5160423184071038,516959870014161,517616468718,5184832408545,5203679249926,5204168193768041249,521523651500159069,5220038210895334,52356139000180161,525704878001810,527427200019010768,52768389857521,52780616000728,528530786800014555,528550937152014,52963060015475,5308729263285729,530941067700010,5316175500018596,532503700014437,53375625837,5339629012485496,53419714300017349,534501000001072,53690017723312,53832750192420,541693510001988,5423006994000188,5424244975151,54248620681100154,54254524300014183,543260993985,54396969016,544157560543871,545617219820526,54719741230001387,547230410000173,5499007906809802,54e32a60fdf99b3eae9de85b,550433748092001090,552320221338692314,552725599901,5532061268578127,55370842001530759,55399576917,554527234511858187,5554325400174122,5588232993184224,558823c2fdf99b318cb4224b,5588532993045679,5588d532fdf99b304ee567b9,55918910009852,5595017001190753,55aeaeb3fdf99b5c769f1f7c,55dbdc9d50a1f7001190d753,55eb04337480920010aa9e0d,560569410144194,560711170000181,560952810001682,5615323200083748,564254000164740,5643607543000390,56492732518761,56616970350005393,5663070350012349,56686645773743,566a1d697da0350005b39de3,566a3e0e7da0350012b3ec49,5675897370002250,56777380015075,56783020006827,569475080000053841,5694e7b5e0c800000b5a3841,569728572000126779,56a7b5eac89737000b225d0e,56b43607c54e3c000d3c9b0b,56cc78e3ccc0e20006b82a7d,56f1d53bf2df32000b8f3748,5708570426200186676,572387600019275,572697770604352,5730740306532000100,5737620867421000181393,5737620867421f000d181393,57448644700011622,57470181300113363,57560142350016135028,576050550001718,5761442280
